## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on 2026 strategy, CVE progress, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**2026 Strategy:** GrowthX will deliver a report next week with recommendations for shifting from vanity metrics (e.g., traffic, AI citations) to conversion-based KPIs.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**CVE Progress:** The trailing slash fix resolved the indexing issue; \~90% of pages are now indexed. A new Looker dashboard provides visual tracking of impressions and clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**CVE Localization:** SentinelOne is exploring localizing the CVE database into 7 languages, which could create a massive 70k+ page site. GrowthX will provide an unbiased opinion on technical and strategic implications.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [**New Tool:** GrowthX's AI visibility tool launches Feb 2–7, enabling a demo and team access for SentinelOne.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

## Topics

### 2026 Strategy & Metrics

  - [**Goal:** Shift focus from vanity metrics to conversion-based KPIs for 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Traditional metrics are declining due to market shifts (e.g., zero-click search, AI search), making them unreliable for measuring performance.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**New KPI Focus:** Website conversions (e.g., form fills) from organic acquisition, including traditional search and AI-driven leads.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will include specific metric recommendations in its strategy report, due next week.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### CVE Database Updates

  - [**Indexing Fix:** The trailing slash fix resolved the indexing issue, with \~90% of pages now indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**New Dashboard:** A Looker dashboard was added for visual tracking of CVE impressions and clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:** The editorial team is publishing new CVEs at a rate of \~1,500 per week.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [**Localization Question:** SentinelOne is evaluating localizing the CVE database into 7 languages.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [**Potential Scale:** This could create a 70,000+ page site (10k pages x 7 languages), with \~6,000 new pages added monthly.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will consult its technical SEO team for an unbiased opinion on the technical and strategic implications.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

### Content & Reporting

  - [**CS101 Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Last week's articles were approved and sent for PMM review.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [Feedback for this week's articles is pending.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [**January Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [A full report will be delivered next week.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [**Current Trends:** Engagement rates are up, LLM referral traffic is steady, and CVE impressions are rising.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

### GrowthX AI Visibility Tool

  - [**Launch:** The tool officially launches Feb 2–7.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Bailey will provide a demo and team access after the launch.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Feedback:** SentinelOne is encouraged to provide feedback to help refine the tool.](https://fathom.video/share/t52boy3fjyVH6-CHBBCqtYuL-CugmucK?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
